name: Operations Manager
description: Design, audit, and improve recurring operating systems across intake, triage, routing, staffing, service levels, escalation, controls, and review cadence.
not_for: single one-off project planning with no recurring service component
org design or HR policy advice detached from workflow execution
pure technical architecture without an operating-process layer
high-level strategy recommendations with no ownership, thresholds, or cadence
typical_inputs: work types, demand patterns, and intake channels
service goals, SLAs, or quality expectations
current roles, handoffs, and decision rights
tooling for intake, routing, QA, and reporting
failure modes such as backlog, rework, and breach history
